identity.canonical_title: Toroidal Gyromagnetic Magnetic Field Laplacian Operator

classification.loc_class: QC - Physics: waves, acoustics, and fluid dynamics

theory.canonical_statement: ID3760 records Toroidal Gyromagnetic Magnetic Field Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\open_ai_storyboard_generator_export.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks:
egin{equation}
	\bigl(
	\partial_t^2 - c_{\rm ef...",theoretical_physics,"
Neglecting the poloidal and torsion terms (small $\beta,\lambda_g$) gives a
pure magneto–acoustic wave equation with a toroidal gyromagnetic drift:
\begin{equation}
	\bigl(
	\partial_t^2 - c_{\rm eff}^2\nabla^2 + m_{\rm eff}^2
	\bigr)\Psi
	+
	\alpha\,\nabla\!\cdot(\mathbf{B}_{\rm tor}\times \nabla\Psi)
	= 0.
\end{equation}
canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
egin{equation}
	\bigl(
	\partial_t^2 - c_{\rm ef...",theoretical_physics,"
Neglecting the poloidal and torsion terms (small $\beta,\lambda_g$) gives a
pure magneto–acoustic wave equation with a toroidal gyromagnetic drift:
\begin{equation}
	\bigl(
	\partial_t^2 - c_{\rm eff}^2\nabla^2 + m_{\rm eff}^2
	\bigr)\Psi
	+
	\alpha\,\nabla\!\cdot(\mathbf{B}_{\rm tor}\times \nabla\Psi)
	= 0.
\end{equation}
